hooks.command: mkdir -p "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/memory" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/cache" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/cache/worker-results" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/cache/web-fetch" 2>/dev/null; python3 --version >/dev/null 2>&1 || echo '[DR WARN] python3 not found — dr-tokens/dr-score will fail' >&2; echo '{"additionalContext": "Deep Research v2.5 loaded. Cache: '"${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}"'/cache/ | Use /deep-research:research \"query\" to start. Add --dry-run to estimate cost without running."}'

KNOWLEDGE_DIR="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/knowledge"; if [ -d "$KNOWLEDGE_DIR" ]; then SUMMARY=$(ls "$KNOWLEDGE_DIR"/*.json 2>/dev/null | head -5 | xargs -I{} python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); print(d.get('topic',''))" {} 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ',' | sed 's/,$//'); if [ -n "$SUMMARY" ]; then python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.dumps({'additionalContext': '[DR Knowledge] Cached topics: ' + sys.argv[1] + ' — dr-knowledge match may find relevant prior research'}))" "$SUMMARY"; exit 0; fi; fi; echo '{"suppressOutput": true}'
echo '{"additionalContext": "[DR] Compaction: research plan and evaluation state are cached at '"${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}"'/cache/. Use dr-cache restore after compaction."}'

CACHE_DIR="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/cache/web-fetch"; mkdir -p "$CACHE_DIR" 2>/dev/null; URL_FROM_INPUT=$(printf '%s' "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); print(d.get('url','') if isinstance(d,dict) else '')" 2>/dev/null); HASH_KEY="${URL_FROM_INPUT:-$TOOL_INPUT}"; HASH=$(printf '%s' "$HASH_KEY" | md5sum | cut -c1-12); ( umask 077 && printf '%s' "$TOOL_OUTPUT" > "$CACHE_DIR/$HASH.txt" ) 2>/dev/null; echo '{"suppressOutput": true}'
